items.title: See NASA’s GUARDIAN Catch a Tsunami
items.content_text: A new animation breaks down how JPL’s AI-supported hazard scout gets the drop on the ocean’s biggest waves.

items.title: March 2026 Company Update
items.content_text: March brought continued progress across the Terran R program, with key milestones across design, manufacturing, testing, and launch preparations.    Design  This month, the team released 2,207 flight parts, with a continued focus on completing the stage one shipping assembly. items.content_text: February marked another month of critical progress across design, build, test, and launch.   Design  This month, the team released an additional 1,826 flight components. items.title: January 2026 Company Update
items.content_text: January marked a strong start to the year, with meaningful progress across design, build, test, and launch.   Design  This month, the team released 1,856 flight parts.
